pi_items.source: Task scripts download https://files.rcsb.org/download/1AOI.pdb and file header confirms it is nucleosome core particle
export_result.sh explicitly writes to this path
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly check this path
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly check this path
verifier.py uses this threshold for figure size
verifier.py checks for at least this many distinct contact residues
verifier.py checks for at least this many basic residues (Arg/Lys)

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task uses real nucleosome core particle data (PDB ID 1AOI) downloaded from RCSB. The expected output file paths perfectly match the export and verifier scripts. The thresholds for figure size (40960 bytes), minimum contact residues (8), and minimum basic residues (3) are precisely enforced in the verifier logic.
